ddt:Target.Name: R3 07 V23
ddt:Target.Description:
R3 07
x91 x95
V01 Jully 11th 2005: Création V02 November 17th: Addons V03 Dev : correctif Diagnosticserviceimplementation ind 604. V04 Dev : motorola format respected. V12 Factory first check V13 DTC modified/ SOUND modified V14 SCREEN updated, size for accoustic parameter updated. V15 tracability year of production in ASCII, identification for accoustic parameters V16 identification updated/ DTC931A1C mutual on 1 or loudspeaker added. V17 ident + correction DTC 939573 + IOCtrl Ecu Reset Preset request V18 screens update V19 CBox, premium amplifier configuration addition V20 CBox, premium amplifier configuration suppression, received data correction V21 corrections conf auto V22: améliorations écrans V23 (02 JULY 2010): requests added: DataRead.RDBI.CNF_SOUND2 ; DataRead.RDBI.CNF_SOUND1 ; WDBI:CNF_TUNER
Lionel Pelletier SII tél: 01768 54035 lionel.pelletier-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: SDS: type of diagnostic session (R)
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (R)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (S)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: RDBLID: Record local ID
Data.Comment: identifies a predifined group of data tobe returned to the tool

Data.Name: LID: VIN: V.I.N.
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID: VIN: C.R.C.
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: IOControl: Parameters
Data.Comment: type of test to be proceeded

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
CD changer facia button " info" KEY ID 45 65 85
CD changer fascia button " down" KEY ID 38 58 78
CD changer fascia button " load" KEY ID 46 66 86
CD changer fascia button " up" KEY ID 37 57 77
CD changer fascia button "1" KEY ID 31 51 71
CD changer fascia button "2" KEY ID 32 52 72
CD changer fascia button "3" KEY ID 33 53 73
CD changer fascia button "4" KEY ID 43 54 74
CD changer fascia button "5" KEY ID 35 55 75
CD changer fascia button "6" KEY ID 36 56 76
CD changer fascia button "eject" KEY ID 47 67 87
CD changer fascia button "left arrow" Key ID 43 63 83
CD changer fascia button "mode" KEY ID 30 50 70
CD changer fascia button "power" KEY ID 5131 5151 5171
CD changer fascia button "right arrow" Key ID 42 62 82
CD changer fascia button R307"audio"/ITS2 "Repeat nav" KEY ID 39 59 79
CD changer fascia button R307"rds i-traffic"/ITS2 "Radio" KEY ID 40 60 80
CD changer fascia button R307"sound"/ITS2 "CD" KEY ID 41 61 81
CD changer fascia button R307"source"/ITS2 "i-traffic" KEY ID 44 64 84
mutual short circuit on 1 or more loudspeaker

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RDBI.Alarm_code
Data.Comment: code to be stored in world wide Renault database

Data.Name: RDBI.dimming of the CD changer
Data.Comment: Illumination control level (dimming from CD Changer)

Data.Name: RDBI.Number_of_CD_inserted
Data.Comment: Number of CD inserted in CD changer

Item.Text: reserved (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 6 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 7 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 8 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 9 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 10 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 11 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 12 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 13 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 14 (same thing for all value equal or higher)

Data.Name: RDBI.test param FM/AM0 (current value).RDBI:TEST PARAM:FM/AM0 Frequency range
RDBI.test param FM/AM0 (current value).RDBI:TEST PARAM:FM/AM0 Frequency tune
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: RDBI.test param FM/AM0 (current value).RDBI:TEST PARAM:FM/AM0 current level field
RDBI.test param FM/AM0 (current value).RDBI:TEST PARAM:FM2 level field
RDBI.VehiculeId DIAG CODE 1 last but two value
RDBI.VehiculeId DIAG CODE 2 last but one value
RDBI.VehiculeId DIAG CODE 3 current VID learned
RDBI.test param FM6 (stored).FM6 fm field min
Data.Comment: FM antenna field Min [dBuV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: RDBI.test param FM6 (stored).FM6 fm field mean
Data.Comment: FM antenna field Mean [dBuV], average value since start of the ECU

Data.Comment: FM antenna field Max [dBuV], maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: RDBI.ECU Configuration
Data.Comment: All (analog input external subwoofer, external amp)

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: IOControl.Availibility
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS
